_publications._publicationTitle: Next-generation variant exon screening: Moving forward in routine genetic disease investigations.

_contextSnippet: being a composite bioinformatics analysis, ngVES requires no changes in laboratory technology or workflow. Sequencing costs are low and are the same as a singular ES investigation, but the patient receives the benefit of a more comprehensive hybrid test
details: Requires no changes in laboratory technology or workflow, with sequencing costs the same as singular ES investigation while providing more comprehensive testing
